reviews.author: Katrina
reviews.text: This was our second year staying at this cottage and we plan to continue visiting it for many years to come! It is a lovely retreat for us as a couple with our two dogs. It was a joy for us to see our dogs playing in the yard, in the sand, and splashing in the water. We spent lots of time outside by the water and really enjoyed the addition of the hammock this year. The fire pit is also beautifully situated with a sunset view of the lake. The inside of the cabin is stunning and extremely clean. The owner is super friendly and communicated everything we needed to know. During our down time, we took many trips to town, including the Bobcaygeon Locks, Bobcaygeon Wildlife Park, and of course, Fenelon Falls. Highly recommend staying here! Thank you for the wonderful hospitality!

reviews.author: Keith
reviews.text: We spent a few nights here during the kids' holiday break, and it was the perfect winter getaway. Being less than two hours from the city made the travel stress-free. The backyard has a perfect little hill where our kids spent hours tobogganing and playing with the snow and ice. The frozen lake was spectacular; walking across the ice at sunrise and sunset provided some of the most beautiful views we've ever seen.After our outdoor adventures, the indoor fireplace was a dream, warming us up instantly and creating such a cozy atmosphere. We also loved being just 10 minutes from Bobcaygeon town. The girls had a blast at the community outdoor rink and the nearby playground. This cottage is a gem for families looking to unplug and enjoy a classic Canadian winter!

reviews.author: Yin
reviews.text: We recently had the pleasure of staying at this wonderful cottage in the summer, and it truly gave my family a memorable getaway. Honestly, the photos don't do it justice—the view of the lake is absolutely incredible and breathtaking from morning to evening.It was the perfect spot for our children (ages 6 and 8). They spent hours kayaking, swimming in the clear lake, and playing in the sandpit. A huge plus for us was the cottage's design; the abundance of windows in the main living area made it incredibly easy to keep a watchful eye on them while they played outside.The owners have clearly put a lot of care into this space. It was spotlessly clean upon arrival, and the well-maintained green space outside made enjoying the beautiful views even easier. Their attention to detail ensures a comfortable and relaxing stay for guests.For a change of scenery, we drove into Bobcaygeon, which is a nice little town with a great variety of dinner options. We really enjoyed exploring it.We can't wait to return and highly recommend this cottage to any family looking for a perfect lakeside vacation!
